verdict: Aveeno's ultra-calming moisturizer uses colloidal oatmeal and feverfew for sensitive skin with added glycerin hydration. Solid formula but formulaically repetitive within the Aveeno line with minimal differentiation.

_research.name: Aveeno Ultra-Calming Moisturizer
pros: Feverfew extract provides antioxidant and soothing benefits
Colloidal oatmeal effective for reactive skin
_research.con: Another oatmeal-based formula from Aveeno; lacks ceramides or advanced barrier-repair ingredients.
